title: Central Festival Mall — Family Day
shortDesc: Air-conditioned mall with kids' rides, food court, cinema, and shops — perfect for a hot afternoon.
description: When the heat gets too much, Central Festival Samui is the perfect cool-down destination. The mall has a large food court with international and Thai options, a kids' play area with rides, a cinema, and plenty of shopping. It's a great half-day option that combines entertainment, food, and air-conditioning — parents and kids alike will find something to enjoy.
priceNote: Free entry, costs vary by activity
